steps.t: Calpheth has asked you to search near Lothgobel for signs of her wayward father, Myldil. Lothgobel is in northern Lamedon.
Myldil has suggested that your time would be well spent digging up clay and gathering quartz crystals. Clay can be found along the banks of the stream…
You have gathered wet clay and sparkling quartz for Myldil. You should bring them to him in Lothgobel. Lothgobel is in Lamedon.
